textByHash.88ca64f63885c84198941f7224b90fbb49ce7886: 'Ello, welcome to my Mining shop, friend!
textByHash.04d26964f0fb41bd8758e0d273d17b0cc135dcdc: I may be short, but at least I've got manners.
textByHash.a53ffee67c10bfb17d075963ea9666e653f9fe4e: The only ores and bars I sell are those sold to me.
